name: ruby-twitter
title: ruby-twitter
summary: Ruby interface to the Twitter API
description:
Ruby interface to the Twitter API
This ruby library provides a convenient access to the Twitter API.
This provides comprehensive methods to access the API. This library
needs only a registration of your application with Twitter. It uses
OAuth protocol for interacting with Twitter API.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-twitter because Ruby interface to the Twitter API.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-twitter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-twitter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-twitter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
